Title: Add Minecraft version config and parameterize block IDs in HtnTaskLibrary
Description:
HtnTaskLibrary hardcodes 'minecraft:oak_log' which requires Minecraft 1.13+. Pre-1.13 servers use 'log' (integer data values).

Implementation:
1. Add MinecraftVersion string to MinecraftAdapterConfig (default: '1.21').
2. Create BlockRegistry helper that maps semantic names to version-specific block IDs.
3. Update HtnTaskLibrary to accept IBlockRegistry as a constructor parameter.
4. Update GatherWoodDecompose to use BlockRegistry.LogBlock(version) instead of hardcoded string.
5. Pass MinecraftAdapterConfig.MinecraftVersion through DI when creating HtnTaskLibrary in Program.cs.
6. Add tests for pre-1.13 and 1.13+ block ID resolution.
